message:
fix(node): eliminate hash collision from serde_json unwrap_or_default before Sha256::digest

Replace .unwrap_or_default() with .unwrap_or_else(|e| format!("__serde_err:{e}")) at 15
sites across 9 files where serialization failure (e.g. NaN floats) would silently hash
an empty string, causing different objects to produce identical digests.

Files: atc_reciprocity (2), atc_participation_weighting (1), saga (1),
transport_fault_gate (1), migration_artifact (1), eviction_saga (1),
virtual_transport_faults (1), frontier_demo_gate (5), barrier_primitives (1),
update_copilot (1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
